_comment: Copy to config/tools.json and fill in for your stack. Set any value to null to skip that check.

enforcement._comment: Severity overrides for hooks that publish a strict-mode contract via RFC-003. Defaults match the post-RFC-003 baseline. Set any value to "warn" to demote a block to a warning for teams that intentionally permit phase skipping or pre-traceability adoption. phase_gate is consumed by phase-gate.sh; file_traceability by work-item-validation.sh; scope_drift is reserved for diff-scope-check.sh; missing_tests is reserved for modified-code-test-gate.sh.

_generated_files_comment: Files listed here are skipped by work-item-validation.sh's file-level traceability check (RFC-003 PR-5/PR-8) when their generated_by source is itself in-scope and REQ-mapped. Add an entry per generated artifact your build system produces. Common candidates: package-lock.json, yarn.lock, generated client SDKs, build artifacts.

integrations._comment: Transport per system: git/github/gitlab/bitbucket use local CLI (git, gh) or native APIs. jira, linear, grafana, datadog, figma require a user-provided MCP server — the plugin does not ship one. cloudwatch is emitted as IaC proposals, not direct API calls. CI values are detection-only; the plugin never triggers pipelines.
integrations._auto_values: git | github | gitlab | bitbucket | jira | linear | null

tracker._comment: Issue tracker connection. type matches the integrations.issue_tracker value. project is the project key (Jira), repo slug (GitHub/GitLab), or team ID (Linear). auth_token goes in config/tools.local.json — never here.

approvals._comment: Multi-team sign-off config. Leave block absent or set roles to [] for single-signer projects. share_path, git_repo, and mcp.connector are mutually exclusive transport options — set one or none.
approvals._git_repo_note: git_repo: URL of a dedicated central approvals git repo (e.g. git@github.com:org/approvals.git). Sign-offs are stored as flat .md files at the repo root. Git auth (SSH key, credential helper, GIT_ASKPASS, etc.) must be configured out-of-band — the reconciler does not manage credentials.

mcp._connector_note: Name of the MCP connector to use for tier 3 sign-off transport (RFC §3.7). Set to the connector name when a connector ships. The reconciler queues sign-offs and emits a sync prompt for Claude to act on. Connector operation contract is deferred — see docs/rfcs/multi-team-approval.md §3.7.

display._comment: Set session_signoff_hints to "off" to suppress the personalized sign-off hint in the SessionStart hook (session-plan-check.sh). Unpersonalized role lists are still shown.

token_tracking._comment: When true, the Stop hook parses the session transcript and writes raw per-phase token counts to .claude/sdlc/token-log.json and token-history.jsonl. Records input/output/cache_creation/cache_read only — no cost calculation.
